name: ytiq
description: YTIq - YouTube Analytics & Content Creator Dashboard

scripts.test:e2e: node tests/setup/cleanDb.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test playwright test tests/e2e

scripts.test:e2e:debug: node tests/setup/cleanDb.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test playwright test tests/e2e --debug
